title: Laser's Rebalance Pack [DISCONTINUED]
description: This pack gives various buffs to older Pokémon to breathe new life into them!
body:
Laser's Rebalance Pack

# IMPORTANT: This pack is DISCONTINUED!
This pack will no longer be updated, as its being replaced by its spiritual successor "Laser's Additions." 
----------------------------------------
![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203ec0ea810d639b3ba10835c1e8da66194083de.png)

**This pack aims to "rebalance" older Pokémon by giving them various buffs! Some of these changes are small and simply min-max their stats a little better... But others completely change their playstyles and move pools!**

As a disclaimer, I do not know if this is actually more balanced. It will probably make some Pokémon way too overcentralizing. I mostly made this for fun, to see if I could improve or fix underwhelming Pokémon.

_(If you use this with my Fakemon Pack, keep in mind I did not design this pack around it... So if you're confused why there's a Water type regional variant of Goodra when regular Goodra is also Water type now, that's why)._

**NOTE:** Some moves given to these Pokémon don't have translations for them yet! This is because they aren't accessible in normal Cobblemon gameplay. They still function, but are missing their names and descriptions. We'll just have to wait for them to update it when those moves get implemented in the future, but for now we'll just have to deal with it.

If you have any questions, need extre info about my packs, or just want to hang out, then consider joining my public Discord: https://discord.gg/fkE5s2BARg

Pokémon Buffs/Changes:
----------------------------------------

<details>
<summary>Blastoise</summary>
  
(Blastoise)
- Replaced Rain Dish with Mega Launcher.
- Increased BST by 5 (530 BST -> 535 BST).
- Increased Sp. Atk by 10 (85 -> 95).
- Decreased Sp. Def by 5 (105 -> 100).

(Mega Blastoise)
- Added Steel as a secondary type.
- Increased BST by 5 (630 BST -> 635 BST).
- Increased Defense by 5 (120 -> 125).
- Increased Sp. Atk by 10 (135 -> 145).
- Increased Defense by 10 (115 -> 125).
- Decreased Attack by 20 (103 -> 85).

</details>
